title: Manufacturing Engineer - Finolex Industries - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Finolex Industries - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Industries has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Finolex Industries:
Finolex Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries!
